chapter_title.en: Seeking the Place to Relieve Oneself and the Etiquettes of Entering and Exiting

text: 54 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَسْتَنْجِيَ كَيْفَ يَقْعُدُ قَالَ «كَمَا يَقْعُدُ لِلْغَائِطِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.54 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about how a man should sit when he wants to perform istinja (cleaning oneself after using the toilet).
Imam (as) said: "As he would sit for relieving himself."
